list.title: Interpreting and Steering a Text-to-Speech Language Model with Sparse Autoencoders

extra.desc: Sparse autoencoders trained on language model representations reveal interpretable features for speech synthesis that can be manipulated to control linguistic and prosodic attributes.

list.title: Kwai Keye-VL-2.0 Technical Report

extra.desc: Kwai Keye-VL-2.0-30B-A3B is an open-source Mixture-of-Experts multimodal foundation model that enables long-video understanding and agentic intelligence through DeepSeek Sparse Attention and specialized training infrastructure.

list.title: IR3DE: A Linear Router for Large Language Models

extra.desc: A ridge regression-based routing method achieves competitive performance in selecting domain-expert LLMs for different tasks while enabling dynamic addition/removal of experts without retraining.

list.title: PsychoSafe: Eliciting Psychologically-Informed Refusals in Large Language Models

extra.desc: A psychologically-informed refusal framework called PsychoSafe is developed for large language models to improve harmful request handling through structured supportive communication, showing enhanced refusal quality and resource referral while maintaining performance on non-refusal tasks.

list.title: BrainSurgery: Reproducible and Reliable Declarative Weight Manipulations for Model Editing and Upcycling

extra.desc: BrainSurgery is a tool for robust and reproducible tensor manipulation of neural network checkpoints through declarative YAML plans with built-in validation.

list.title: UniPET: a universal network for high-quality PET image denoising across varied dose reduction factors

extra.desc: A universal PET image denoising framework addresses variability in dose reduction factors through domain generalization techniques and region-aware learning strategies.

list.title: U-TTT: Towards Generalizable PET Image Denoising via Test-Time Training

extra.desc: A novel U-shaped deep learning model with test-time training layers and dual-domain adaptation mechanisms achieves robust PET image denoising under distribution shifts.

list.title: Role-Agent: Bootstrapping LLM Agents via Dual-Role Evolution

extra.desc: Role-Agent framework enables LLM agents to function as both agent and environment through bootstrapped co-evolution, improving performance via environment-aware reasoning and targeted practice.

list.title: Late-Layer Fusion is Enough: Dual-Path Vision Token Routing for Multimodal Large Language Models under Visual Saturation

extra.desc: Research reveals that vision and text tokens in multimodal models evolve asynchronously, leading to inefficient computation; a new asymmetric routing framework reduces visual processing overhead while maintaining performance.

list.title: MemDreamer: Decoupling Perception and Reasoning for Long Video Understanding via Hierarchical Graph Memory and Agentic Retrieval Mechanism

extra.desc: MemDreamer addresses long-video understanding challenges by decoupling perception and reasoning through hierarchical graph memory and agentic exploration, achieving state-of-the-art performance with reduced computational overhead.

list.title: Retrospective Harness Optimization: Improving LLM Agents via Self-Preference over Trajectory Rollouts

extra.desc: Retrospective Harness Optimization (RHO) is a self-supervised method that improves AI agent performance by optimizing agent harness using only past trajectories through diverse task selection, parallel re-solving, and self-validation techniques.

list.title: Lip Forcing: Few-Step Autoregressive Diffusion for Real-time Lip Synchronization

extra.desc: Autoregressive diffusion method for video-to-video lip synchronization achieves real-time performance through distillation and optimized inference schedules.

list.title: Flow-DPPO: Divergence Proximal Policy Optimization for Flow Matching Models

extra.desc: Flow-DPPO replaces ratio clipping with divergence proximal constraints in flow matching models, improving training stability and multi-objective optimization through exact KL divergence computation.

list.title: Data Journalist Agent: Transforming Data into Verifiable Multimodal Stories

extra.desc: A multi-agent framework automates data journalism by generating evidence-grounded, multimodal news stories while maintaining transparency and verifiability.

list.title: WorldOlympiad: Can Your World Model Survive a Triathlon?

extra.desc: WorldOlympiad presents a comprehensive benchmark for evaluating video-based world models across physical faithfulness, geometric consistency, and interaction fidelity, revealing significant gaps in current generative models' capabilities.

list.title: Attention Amnesia in Hybrid LLMs: When CoT Fine-Tuning Breaks Long-Range Recall, and How to Fix It

extra.desc: Chain-of-thought supervised fine-tuning degrades long-context recall in hybrid linear-attention models by biasing attention gradients toward short-range patterns, but a training-free method called QK-Restore can restore long-context capabilities by reverting query-key projections while preserving reasoning performance.

list.title: Rethinking the Divergence Regularization in LLM RL

extra.desc: DRPO improves LLM reinforcement learning stability by replacing hard masks with smooth regularization that provides continuous gradient corrections beyond trust-region boundaries.

list.title: EEVEE: Towards Test-time Prompt Learning in the Real World for Self-Improving Agents

extra.desc: EEVEE is a novel test-time prompt learning framework for LLM agents that handles heterogeneous data streams through task clustering and co-evolving router-prompt optimization.

list.title: SearchSwarm: Towards Delegation Intelligence in Agentic LLMs for Long-Horizon Deep Research

extra.desc: A large language model trained on synthesized delegation intelligence achieves superior performance on long-horizon research tasks through task decomposition and subagent coordination.

list.title: One Token per Multimodal Evidence: Latent Memory for Resource-Constrained QA

extra.desc: Latent Memory introduces a compressed representation approach for external memory in question answering, reducing token consumption and storage requirements while maintaining competitive performance across text-only and multimodal benchmarks.

list.title: Struct-Searcher: Agentic Structural Thinking Advances Multimodal Deep Information Seeking

extra.desc: Struct-Searcher introduces a belief revision theory-based structural agentic workflow for multimodal information seeking that improves accuracy over existing vision-language models and deep research agents.

list.title: How Does Reasoning Flow? Tracing Attention-Induced Information Flow for Targeted RL in LLMs

extra.desc: FlowTracer is an RL framework that uses attention-induced graphs to trace reasoning flows and assign token-level credit based on global information propagation structures.

list.title: When the Chain of Thought Knows Better: Failure Modes in Multi-Turn Reasoning Models

extra.desc: Multi-turn reasoning models exhibit hidden alignment failures that are masked by traditional evaluation methods, revealing vulnerabilities through a trace-level diagnostic framework that identifies distinct failure modes including context-injection failures.

list.title: Emergent Misalignment Can Be Induced by Sycophancy and Reversed via Alignment Gating

extra.desc: Sycophancy fine-tuning contributes to emergent misalignment in language models, which can be reversed using Alignment Gating—a method that inserts learnable gates to identify and control unsafe responses while maintaining general capabilities.

list.title: ARM: An AutoRegressive Large Multimodal Model with Unified Discrete Representations

extra.desc: ARM demonstrates a unified autoregressive framework for image understanding, generation, and editing through discrete semantic tokenization and reinforcement learning optimization.

list.title: Bridging the Agent-World Gap: Text World Models for LLM-based Agents

extra.desc: Text world models serve as transition models for LLM-based agents in interactive environments, enabling planning and efficient learning by predicting environmental changes from textual states and actions.

list.title: Dynamic Linear Attention

extra.desc: DLA addresses limitations in long-context LLMs by introducing adaptive state merging and capacity-bounded memory modeling for improved multi-state linear attention.

list.title: SCAIL-2: Unifying Controlled Character Animation with End-to-end In-Context Conditioning

extra.desc: SCAIL-2 enables end-to-end character animation by directly transferring motion from driving videos without intermediate representations, using unified task decomposition and synthetic data generation.

list.title: Workflow-GYM: Towards Long-Horizon Evaluation of Computer-use Agentic tasks in Real-World Professional Fields

list.title: Test-Time Gradient Guidance of Flow Policies in Reinforcement Learning

list.title: MilliVid: Hierarchical Latents for Long-Range Consistency in Video Generation

list.title: VoLo: A Physical Orchestrator for Open-Vocabulary Long-Horizon Manipulation

list.title: AsyncWebRL: Efficient Multi-Step RL for Visual Web Agents
